prestazioni: Supercharger upgrade to a Magnuson TVS2650 (engine code LT4, 6.2L V8) with a custom billet aluminum pulley system (3.6" diameter) and a dual-core intercooler from CSF Racing (part #8216) to support 12 psi of boost, increasing output to 850 whp on E85 fuel with a supporting fuel system upgrade including dual Walbro 450 LPH pumps and ID1000x injectors

Full exhaust overhaul with a custom 3.5" titanium exhaust system from Burns Stainless (mandrel-bent, 409 stainless steel) featuring a quad-tip setup with Akrapovič carbon fiber tips (part #S-CA16-TI) and a GESI 400-cell catalytic converter for emissions compliance while reducing backpressure by 40%

Suspension and handling package featuring a full KW Suspensions Clubsport 3-way adjustable coilover kit (part #3W932-00-00) with custom valving for the Escalade V’s 6,000 lb+ weight, paired with an Eibach Pro-Spacer kit (part #92-05-020) to widen the track by 20mm and a set of H&R Super Sport Springs (part #29142-2) for a 1.2" drop, complemented by a Detroit Speed Inc. (DSI) front sway bar (part #020001) and a Hotchkis rear sway bar (part #22115) to eliminate body roll
estetica: Widebody conversion using a Liberty Walk LB Works kit (part #LW-ESC19) specifically designed for the 2021+ Escalade, featuring carbon fiber fender flares, front/rear bumpers, and side skirts with integrated LED turn signals, paired with a custom matte Satin Black vinyl wrap from 3M (series 2080, color #M227)

Custom front grille replacement with a 3D-printed titanium mesh grille from Fath Fabrication (part #FF-ESC-V-GRILLE) featuring a hidden radar-compatible design and a laser-etched Cadillac crest, complemented by a set of Anzo USA LED headlights (part #111617) with adaptive high beams and sequential turn signals

Interior overhaul with a full Alcantara headliner and door cards from Katzkin (part #KZ-ESC-V-ALC), custom Recaro Sportster CS seats (part #29101) with integrated 4-point harnesses from Schroth (part #62024), and a custom carbon fiber dashboard overlay from Seibon (part #CAD-ESC-V-DASH) featuring a relocated 12.3" digital gauge cluster from HP Tuners (part #HP-DG-12)
